close_reason: Already fixed: inventory closures use imported Arc
description: secretx-env/src/lib.rs:67-73 The inventory::submit! body uses 'std::sync::Arc<dyn secretx_core::SecretStore>' fully qualified despite secretx_core::SecretStore already being in scope via the 'use' at lib.rs:16. A 'use std::sync::Arc;' at the top of the file (and using just 'Arc<dyn SecretStore>' in the macro body) would be more readable. Filed as opinion-tier — sibling crate secretx-file does the same fully-qualified form, so this is a workspace convention; fixing it everywhere is a larger change than this single crate.
title: inventory::submit! uses fully-qualified Arc and trait paths
